# Flowchart: Rule Traversal Logic

**Layer**: Dynamic — Conditional decision paths  
**Trigger**: ≥3 conditional decision paths in offline rule traversal  
**Scenario**: `internal/matcher` — 单报文在一条链上的规则遍历逻辑  
**Generated by**: speckit-architect skill  

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  START([开始遍历链 chain]) --> RULE_ITER[取下一条规则]
  RULE_ITER --> HAS_RULE{还有规则?}

  HAS_RULE -- 否 --> END_OF_CHAIN{是内建链?}
  END_OF_CHAIN -- 是 --> APPLY_POLICY[应用默认链策略<br>生成 policy TraceStep]
  APPLY_POLICY --> TERMINAL_POLICY([最终判决: 链默认策略])
  END_OF_CHAIN -- 否 --> RETURN_TO_PARENT[RETURN 到父链<br>父链继续下一条规则]

  HAS_RULE -- 是 --> MATCH{报文匹配该规则?}
  MATCH -- 否 --> RECORD_MISS[记录 TraceStep<br>Matched=false, Action=CONTINUE]
  RECORD_MISS --> RULE_ITER

  MATCH -- 是 --> CHECK_TARGET{目标类型}

  CHECK_TARGET -- ACCEPT --> RECORD_ACCEPT[记录 TraceStep<br>Matched=true, Action=ACCEPT]
  RECORD_ACCEPT --> TERMINAL_ACCEPT([最终判决: ACCEPT])

  CHECK_TARGET -- DROP --> RECORD_DROP[记录 TraceStep<br>Matched=true, Action=DROP]
  RECORD_DROP --> TERMINAL_DROP([最终判决: DROP])

  CHECK_TARGET -- REJECT --> RECORD_REJECT[记录 TraceStep<br>Matched=true, Action=REJECT<br>附 reject-with 类型]
  RECORD_REJECT --> TERMINAL_REJECT([最终判决: REJECT])

  CHECK_TARGET -- RETURN --> RECORD_RETURN[记录 TraceStep<br>Matched=true, Action=RETURN]
  RECORD_RETURN --> RETURN_TO_PARENT

  CHECK_TARGET -- JUMP chain_x --> RECORD_JUMP[记录 TraceStep<br>Matched=true, Action=JUMP chain_x]
  RECORD_JUMP --> RECURSE[递归遍历 chain_x]
  RECURSE --> JUMP_RESULT{子链结果?}
  JUMP_RESULT -- 终止判决 --> PROPAGATE_VERDICT([传播最终判决])
  JUMP_RESULT -- RETURN --> RULE_ITER

  CHECK_TARGET -- LOG/其他非终止 --> RECORD_NONTERMINAL[记录 TraceStep<br>Matched=true, Action=CONTINUE]
  RECORD_NONTERMINAL --> RULE_ITER
```
